title: Awaited<Promise<T>>
description: `Awaited<Promise<T>>` unwraps the promise at the type level and resolves to the plain object `{a: string; b: number; c: Date}`; the serializer sees only that resolved shape across JSON and binary.
notes: The unwrapped `c` is a Date — ISO string over JSON (revived `new Date`), 8-byte float64 epoch over binary.
pureType: createJsonEncoder<Awaited<Promise<{a: string; b: number; c: Date}>>>(undefined, {strategy: 'clone'})
schema: createJsonEncoder(RT.object({a: RT.string(), b: RT.number(), c: RT.date()}))
